channel.title: Satpreet H. Singh
channel.description: Recent content on Satpreet H. Singh

item.title: Research
item.description: I recently defended my PhD and am now on the job market for full-time roles starting Jan 2022 (Resume/CV) Research Current interests: Agents, Games & Reinforcement Learning Recurrent Neural Networks & Dynamical Systems Inverse problems in Learning & Control Self-organization and brain/biology/nature inspired algorithms Statistical Neuroscience –> PhD (Sept. 2017 - Dec. 2021) PhD at the University of Washington (Seattle), at the intersection of ML/RL and Computational Neuroscience.
